display: We are going to create a very detailed spec document in this session. The spec document will be broken up into two phases...Phase 1: mcp server completion + deck stability. I want to move deck storage out of local storage and persist it to a db and back it up with a docker volume...

Read the last session, it's contents are in @session-output.txt - the goal of this workstream was to implement the spec as defined in @.claude/specs/v0-production-release.md - A majority of that work was implemented. I am now manually QA-ing the app and I am seeing an issue in the google auth sign up flow, where when I click on the button to auth with google I am brought to the React Router default error page. I want to fix this issue and perform any further work needed to prepare this for a v0 release
We're continuing the competitive parity workstream for Project Johto (DeckVault — Pokemon TCG platform). Implement Tier 3: T3-A archetype tier list, T3-B rotation calendar, T3-C CP tracker.
